name: Check Deployer OIDC Stack
description: Verify the oidc_production stack received the 4 DEPLOYER_OIDC_* provides published by template 340. Without these, downstream OIDC consumers cannot authenticate against Zitadel via stack-resolution and would fall back to reading /bootstrap/deployer-oidc.json over pct-exec.

commands.description: Verify 4 DEPLOYER_OIDC_* fields present and non-empty in oidc_production stack
